title: SearchMetadata
description: Execution metadata for a single search. Generated from `src/types.rs::SearchMetadata` (v0.8.0).

hash_seletores.description: FNV-1a hash of the active selector configuration, 16 hex chars.

retentativas.description: Number of HTTP retries executed (honored since v0.7.8 GAP-WS-57).

usou_endpoint_fallback.description: True if the request fell back from html to lite endpoint.

fetches_simultaneos.description: Peak concurrent HTTP fetches during this search.

usou_chrome.description: v0.8.0+: True if Chrome-primary search succeeded. Prior to v0.8.0 this indicated headless fallback only.

tentou_chrome.description: v0.8.0+: True if the Chrome-primary search path was attempted (requires chrome feature enabled).

user_agent.description: The User-Agent header that was sent.

identidade_usada.description: v0.7.10+: 12-hex identity tag from the 12-identity anti-bot pool. Present in success AND failure paths since GAP-WS-60.

nivel_cascata.description: v0.6.4+: Cascade level reached during the request (0..=4).

usou_proxy.description: True if the request went through --proxy.

pre_flight_disparado.description: v0.7.9+: True if the pre-flight ghost-block detector fired.

causa_zero.description: v0.8.0+: Causal classification of zero-result scenarios.

bytes_brutos.description: v0.8.0+: Raw bytes received from DDG before HTTP decompression (gzip/deflate/br). Null when compression was not used.

bytes_descomprimidos.description: v0.8.0+: Bytes after HTTP decompression. Null when no compression or no body.

cascata_nivel_observado.description: v0.8.0+: Cascade level observed during the most recent probe-deep call in the same process. Used by classify_zero_result as cross-signal when pre_flight is not active.
